---
title: "Science-Policy Interfaces And Scenario Construction In Chile: How To Better Bridge Scientific Evidence With Policy-Making? An Inter-Transdisciplinary Challenge For Environmental Complex Problems"
date: "2023-01-01"
author: "Anahi Veronica Josefina Urquiza Gomez"
departamento: "Trabajo Social"
coinvestigadores: "Gabriela Alejandra Azocar De La Cruz"
categories: ["Fondecyt Regular"]
keywords: ["ACTIONABLE KNOWLEDGEDECISION-MAKING UNDER DEEP UNCERTAINTYINTERDISCIPLINARY MODELING"]
concurso: "Fondecyt Regular"
codigo_proyecto: "1231404"
fecha_inicio: "2023"
fecha_termino: "2027"
duracion: "48 meses"
url_abstract: "https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/9c8d984af1c94cad73c3aeab06795898"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: file-text
      href: https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/9c8d984af1c94cad73c3aeab06795898
---
